title: No Double Slab Placement
description: This client mod provides a toggle which would prevent you from placing a slab in a place where it would form a double-slab block.
body:
This mod adds a toggle which prevents the player from placing a slab-block in a place where it could form into a double slab block.

- The toggle is triggered through a configurable key-bind.   
- `U` key is set as the default keybind for toggling the feature on and off
- The key-bind can be configured from the vanila key-binds option menu

**By default it is toggled on, to disable the mod/feature and allow the placement of double slabs you must toggle it off yourself with the key-bind**
